title: tristemon uliginosus
intro: Tristemon uliginosus, also known as Marsh-Club Moss, is a species of club moss that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tristemon uliginosus include reducing fever, alleviating cough and respiratory problems, and providing relief from skin irritations and wounds. The herbal preparations of Tristemon uliginosus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
